title: The Killing of Ja'far
description: [6781 Al-Fa4l b. Sulayman b. All has mentioned that al-Rashid performed the Pilgrimage in the year 186 (802), and that he returned homewards from Mecca and reached al-Hirah in al-MuWrram, 187 (December, 802-January, 803) on his return journey from the Pilgrimage. He stayed for a few days at the palace of 'Awn al'Ibadi733 and then set out by boat until he stopped at al-'Umr in the vicinity of al-Anbir.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 30
